348.issue_title: safe_edit_file: strip diff from response, keep compact actionable result

cycles.name: C_348.1 — Remove diff from agent-facing safe_edit_file contract
cycles.exit_criteria: The agent-facing safe_edit_file contract no longer exposes show_diff; default safe_edit_file responses no longer include diff preview; useful status and validation feedback remains intact; directly affected safe_edit_file unit tests pass against the compact response contract; targeted quality gates pass for all touched files.

deliverables.description: Narrow pre-implementation audit confirms whether SafeEditInput, _generate_diff(), and show_diff references widen the local blast radius.
mcp_server/tools/safe_edit_tool.py updated so the agent-facing safe_edit_file contract no longer publicly exposes show_diff.
safe_edit_file default response builders no longer include diff preview while preserving useful status and validation feedback.
Directly affected safe_edit_file tests updated to assert the compact response contract.
Targeted quality gates pass for all touched production and test files.
